## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Outset to discuss content strategy and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outset's content is gaining impressions but low clicks (9) after 1 month of publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Communication challenges due to Lawson's (Outset CEO) limited Slack access](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on tutorial-style, authoritative content (50k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO potential exists but not currently implemented](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [9 clicks after 1 month of publishing, raising concerns](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [50,000 words per month being produced](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Tutorial-style content with stats and sources preferred by client](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Developed series on "How to Become a Specialty: A Guide for Teens" (9 specialties)](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Considering more programmatic approach for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Image generation column added to content production process](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### Communication Challenges

  - [Lawson (CEO) lost Slack access after trial period ended](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Team exploring options to add Lawson to specific Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Email communication working well but Slack preferred for easier interaction](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Mariana to send meeting summary and explore bi-weekly meeting option](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### SEO Progress and Opportunities

  - [Mostly ranking for branded queries currently](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Non-branded keywords starting to gain traction](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Expectation: 3 months for articles to rank typically](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Opportunity: Expand summer camp series for other partner universities](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Considering comprehensive article listing all summer camps, including competitors](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Client Engagement

  - [Lawson (CEO and sole point of contact) absent from meeting](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Quick content approval process established](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Limited intervention needed from client in content production](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Account Overview

  - [Medical summer camps for high school students](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Partnerships with 7 universities for camp locations](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Limited spaces available in summer programs](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate Slack access options for Lawson](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Mariana to send meeting summary and propose bi-weekly meeting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO opportunities for local and specialty-related content](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Consider expanding summer camp series for partner universities](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Evaluate creation of comprehensive summer camp list article](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Monitor non-branded keyword performance over next 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/QSRRymcKfKLMj5SGW1aWuwkQEsmxhpCe?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
